What Baljia Does

Not a Chatbot. An AI Angel.

It doesn't suggest things for you to do. It does them.

Your AI Angel handles every department — building, marketing, operations, and growth — 24/7, while you focus on your vision.

⚡

Builds Real Software, Not Suggestions

Full-stack apps, APIs, and databases — coded, tested, and deployed. Production-ready software within hours, not months. No devs needed.

📣

Runs Your Marketing on Autopilot

Landing pages, ad copy, social campaigns, email sequences, and funnel optimization — created, scheduled, and optimized automatically.

📧

Handles Ops So You Don't Have To

Customer support, investor updates, vendor comms, and daily admin — managed automatically while you focus on strategy.

🌑

Works 24/7 — Even While You Sleep

Your AI Angel never clocks out. It checks what's working, what's broken, and what's missing — then fixes it overnight.

👀

Fully Transparent. You're Always in Control

See every task, every action, every result. Approve or reject anything from your dashboard. No black box. Nothing runs without your visibility.

🧠

Gets Smarter the More You Use It

Every interaction makes Baljia smarter about your market, your customers, and your goals. Your AI Angel learns, adapts, and improves every day.

How It Works

Dream It. Baljia Builds It.

Whether you're a founder, freelancer, side-project builder, or creator — six steps, zero effort.

No coding, no hiring, no complexity. Just tell your AI Angel what you want — it handles the rest.

01

Tell Your AI Angel Your Idea

Describe what you want to build — SaaS, e-commerce, marketplace, anything. Share a URL, upload a doc, or just say what's on your mind.

02

Your Company Gets Set Up

Website, database, email, market research, strategy, and a roadmap — all created automatically in minutes based on your idea.

03

Your AI Angel Runs Operations

Engineering, marketing, outreach, support, analytics, and more. Tasks get planned, executed, and verified around the clock.

04

Launch to the World

Your AI Angel takes you live — launches your product publicly, gets your first users, and starts generating revenue from day one.

05

You Stay in Control

Everything runs through a simple dashboard. Approve or reject tasks, review progress, and see exactly what's happening. Nothing runs without your visibility.

06

Your AI Angel Never Sleeps

Every night, your AI Angel checks what's working, what's broken, and what's missing — then fixes it. Your business improves while you rest.

FAQ

Common Questions

Everything you need to know before joining.
Baljia is an all-in-one AI workspace for solo founders. It validates your business ideas, builds full-stack products (apps, APIs, databases), creates and schedules marketing campaigns, handles operations like support and investor updates, and helps with revenue growth — all from a single AI-powered platform. Think of it as your personal AI Angel that handles every department while you focus on your vision.
While ChatGPT is a general-purpose conversational AI, Baljia is purpose-built for running a business. It doesn't just give advice — it takes action. Baljia builds real deployable software, creates and schedules marketing campaigns, drafts investor decks, and automates operational workflows. Baljia is your AI Angel that takes action, not just a chatbot that gives advice.
Baljia builds full-stack applications including SaaS products, e-commerce stores, marketplaces, and internal tools. It generates working code, sets up databases, creates APIs, deploys landing pages, and produces marketing assets — all within hours of receiving your idea. The software is real, tested, and production-ready.
Baljia is launching in Q2 2026. Detailed pricing will be announced closer to launch, but there will be a generous free tier for early waitlist members. The first 1,000 founders who join the waitlist receive priority access and exclusive lifetime early-adopter pricing.
Baljia is designed specifically for solo founders, solopreneurs, and early-stage startup founders who need to move fast without hiring a full team. If you have a business idea but lack the engineering, marketing, or operations resources to bring it to life, Baljia is built for you. No technical background is required.
Absolutely. Baljia is designed for non-technical founders. You describe what you want in plain language — no coding required. Baljia handles all the technical complexity: writing code, setting up infrastructure, deploying applications, and managing ongoing operations. You focus on the idea; Baljia handles the execution.

"You focus on the vision.
Your AI Angel handles everything else."

— Baljia AI · Bringing your ideas to reality
